display_text: Aghanim's Shard - Consumable, Cost: 1400: Upgrades an existing ability or adds a new ability to your hero. This consumable item is permanently applied to your hero, providing a shard upgrade. The effect is hero-specific, enhancing ultimate abilities or adding new mechanics. Stats: Cost: 1400.
